toolSpec.name: get_resource_schema_information
toolSpec.description: Get schema information for an AWS resource.

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

toolSpec.name: list_resources
toolSpec.description: List AWS resources of a specified type.

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

toolSpec.name: get_resource
toolSpec.description: Get details of a specific AWS resource.

identifier.description: The primary identifier of the resource to get (e.g., bucket name for S3 buckets)

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

identifier.description: The primary identifier of the resource to get (e.g., bucket name for S3 buckets)

patch_document.description: A list of RFC 6902 JSON Patch operations to apply

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

properties.description: A dictionary of properties for the resource

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

identifier.description: The primary identifier of the resource to get (e.g., bucket name for S3 buckets)

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

toolSpec.name: get_resource_request_status
toolSpec.description: Get the status of a long running operation with the request token.

request_token.description: The request_token returned from the long running operation

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in

toolSpec.name: create_template
toolSpec.description: Create a CloudFormation template from existing resources using the IaC Generator API.

resources.description: List of resources to include in the template, each with 'ResourceType' and 'ResourceIdentifier'

output_format.description: Output format for the template (JSON or YAML)

deletion_policy.description: Default DeletionPolicy for resources in the template (RETAIN, DELETE, or SNAPSHOT)

update_replace_policy.description: Default UpdateReplacePolicy for resources in the template (RETAIN, DELETE, or SNAPSHOT)

template_id.description: ID of an existing template generation process to check status or retrieve template

save_to_file.description: Path to save the generated template to a file

region.description: The AWS region that the operation should be performed in
